exam_price_notes: $93 exam fee + ~$30 test center fee. Fee waivers for military/low-income.
target_audience: Students who have completed a college-level survey course in American literature
recommended_experience: Read widely and developed an appreciation of American literature, know the basic literary periods, and have a sense of the historical development of American literature

prerequisites.description: Completed a college-level survey course in American literature

domains.name: The Precolonial, Colonial and Early National Period (Beginnings–1800)
The Period of Realism and Naturalism (1865–1910)
